# DayRoute

> DayRoute is the all-in-one field-service app for Australian sole traders and small crews. It turns quoting, invoicing, receipts, mileage, and tax into a few taps from your phone — on site. Built in Australia for tradies, gardeners, cleaners, pressure washing, pest control, pool care, NDIS & home care, maintenance, and small teams.

DayRoute is available on the Apple App Store (iPhone, iPad, and Mac). It is not charged per user — Team plans cover a whole crew for one price, which makes it dramatically cheaper than per-seat platforms.

## What DayRoute does

- **Smart daily route planning**: orders the day's jobs the efficient way and navigates door to door, cutting back-tracking and fuel.
- **One-tap GST invoicing**: send a professional, GST-correct invoice by text or email before leaving the job. See who still owes you at a glance.
- **AI receipt scanning**: snap a photo and DayRoute reads the receipt (amount, date, details) and logs the expense instantly.
- **Automatic ATO mileage logbook**: a built-in GPS logbook records work trips automatically — ATO-ready, no second app required.
- **Automated customer ETA texts**: on-my-way, running-late, and 15-minutes-away alerts sent for you.
- **BAS-ready reporting**: income, expenses, and GST tracked as you go, so BAS is ready when you are.
- **Job scheduling & client management**: store client details, notes, photos, and job status in one place.
- **Team coordination**: live team map, job assignment, real-time progress, and shared invoices/receipts/expenses.

## Who DayRoute is for

Australian mobile and field-service businesses, including: tradies (plumbers, electricians, builders, handymen), gardeners and lawn care, cleaners, pressure washing, pest control, pool and spa care, NDIS support workers and home-care providers, mobile mechanics, mobile detailing, pet grooming, HVAC and appliance repair, and other small crews who visit multiple locations each day.

## Pricing (AUD, 7-day free trial on all plans)

- **Pro (solo)**: $19.99/month or $190/year (save ~2 months).
- **Team (up to 3 users)**: $49.99/month or $490/year — about $16.66 per user.
- **Team (up to 10 users)**: $99.99/month or $990/year — about $10 per user.
- **Extra member**: $14.99/member/month or $149.99/member/year.

DayRoute does not charge per user. The big field-service platforms typically charge around $49 per user per month, so a DayRoute crew of 10 costs less than a single seat elsewhere.

## Platform and availability

- **Platform**: iOS (iPhone, iPad) and Mac. Requires iOS 15.0 or later.
- **Country**: Australia (Australian addresses, AUD pricing, GST/BAS support).
- **Android**: on the roadmap; not available yet.
- **App Store**: https://apps.apple.com/au/app/dayroute/id6757166638

## Key pages

- [Home](https://dayroute.com.au/): positioning, problems solved, and pricing overview.
- [Features](https://dayroute.com.au/features): full feature breakdown.
- [Pricing](https://dayroute.com.au/pricing): plans, per-user value, and comparison.
- [Industries](https://dayroute.com.au/industries): supported trades and service businesses.
- [Blog](https://dayroute.com.au/blog): practical guides for running a field-service business in Australia.
- [FAQ](https://dayroute.com.au/faq): common questions about features, pricing, and tax.
- [About](https://dayroute.com.au/about): the story of founder Adrian Stroe and why DayRoute was built.
- [Support](https://dayroute.com.au/support): contact and help.

## Flagship guides

- [Plan efficient multi-stop routes](https://dayroute.com.au/blog/how-to-plan-efficient-multi-stop-routes-for-service-businesses): how service businesses cut driving time and fuel.
- [ATO vehicle logbook requirements 2026](https://dayroute.com.au/blog/ato-vehicle-logbook-requirements-for-tradies-2026): what tradies must record to claim car expenses.
- [NDIS travel claims explained](https://dayroute.com.au/blog/ndis-travel-claims-what-support-workers-can-claim): what support workers can claim for travel.
- [Plan a daily cleaning route](https://dayroute.com.au/blog/how-to-plan-a-daily-cleaning-route-that-saves-time-and-fuel): saving time and fuel on a cleaning round.
- [Cost to run a pool service round](https://dayroute.com.au/blog/how-much-does-it-cost-to-run-a-pool-service-round-in-australia): real Australian numbers for pool techs.
